name: AIR-DROW Bootstrap Reliability Hotfix Edition
delivery: This complete bootstrap-reliability source package is ready for npm ci and npm run vercel:build. node_modules and public are intentionally excluded because the production output is regenerated from package-lock.json and web during build.
iconReplacement: The complete local icon package remains installed. This release standardizes the AIR-DROW mark and improves contrast across dark and light themes.
